titleStmt.title: SII 4.1141: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1141. (A.R. No. 277 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
caturtthavaṁśaścaturānanasya[.1*] vaṁśēsminsa himāṁśu ya
śōvyāptakṣamāmaṇḍalaḥ śrīmānvīrarasāśrayō guṇanidhiḥ śrīmallabhūpōjani . yēna tryaṁbakapallavāddraṇaśirassāhāyyakārādhitāt prāptōyaṁ velanāṇḍunāma
viṣayassāmaṁttacihnaissaha [. 2*] Atha tadvaṁśajātēṣu yātēṣu guṇaśāliṣu . Anēkēṣu mahīpālēṣvanēkēṣuhatāriṣu [. 3*] tadvaṁśyōbhūnniṣkalaṁkkō guṇāṁkō goṁkkō vidva
tpaṁkajālīmṛgāṁkaḥ . kīrttijyōssnādhautadikcakravālaśāryyaślāghī kiṁkaraśśaṁkkarasya [.4*] Āsītpriyā tasya nṛpuṁggavasya goṁkkakṣitīśasya mṛgāṁkkavaktrā . sabbāṁbikā sarvvaguṇōpapannā pulōma
kanyēva puraṁddarasya [. 5*] tayōrjjayaṁtapratimaprabhāvōrājēṁdracōḍōracitāripīḍaḥ . Abhūtsutassūnṛtavāganēkasaṁggrāmaraṁggārjjitaśubhra kīrttiḥ [. 6*] guṇḍāṁbikāṁśītagumaṇḍalābhava
ktrānnijācārajitānasūyāṁ . Agaṇyapuṇyāṁ guṇaratnagurvvīṁ sa cōḍabhūpō vidhinōpayēmē [. 7*] tābhyāṁ bhavānībhavasannibhābhyāṁ jātastanūjaḥ prabhuśaktiyuktaḥ . śrīgoṁkkabhūpaḥ sṛ
tanīlakaṇṭassainyasya nētā mahatō guhçō vā [. 8*] jātē yatra kalānidhāviva divē jātaṁ prajānāṁ sukhaṁ yatpādābjatalē gatē kṣititalandharmmaḥ pratiṣṭhāṁ gataḥ . Ētaccitrataraṁ ya ṣayē sa
rvvāgrahārā Amī kōdaṇḍaspṛśi yatkarē samabhavanmuktāḥ karasparśataḥ [. 9*] vīraśrīlalanākaṭākṣarucinā vidhrāvya bāhasinā sēnāṁ kuṁttalavallabhasya nikaṭē gōdāvarīsaṁgarē . prāpallakṣmaṇadaṇḍanāthasahitaṁ
gōviṁdadaṇḍādhipaṁ jitvā hāṭakakhōṭakōṣṭravivahairvvīraśrīyaṁ yaḥ pa [. 10*] smin bhūpaśikhaṇḍamaṇḍanamaṇau kōdaṇḍagāṇḍīvini śrīkhaṇḍāmṛtapiṇḍapāṇḍuyaśasi kṣmāmaṇḍa
śrīmā prādādakhaṇḍānmudā . dākṣārāmanivāsinē bhagavatē bhīmāya paṁccāśa
Digital edition of SII 4.1141 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
